heading: Reporting requirements
label: 5313 Reporting requirements
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 93–38388 Stat. 633Aug. 22, 1974

Amendments1990—Subsec. (a)(4). added par. (4).Pub. L. 101–6251981—Subsec. (a)(2). struck out requirement respecting approval by the Secretary.Pub. L. 97–351977—Subsec. (a)(3). added par. (3).Pub. L. 95–128

Effective Date of 1981 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as an Effective Date note under , Banks and Banking.Pub. L. 97–35section 371 of Pub. L. 97–35section 3701 of Title 12Oct. 1, 1981
Effective Date of 1977 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 95–128section 114 of Pub. L. 95–128section 5301 of this titleOct. 1, 1977

Study Regarding Availability of Housing Proximate to Places of Employment, , , directed Secretary of Housing and Urban Development to conduct a study regarding availability of housing within reasonable proximity of places of employment and to submit a report not later than expiration of 1-year period beginning on , to appropriate committees of Congress containing results and conclusions of such study, as well as proposed strategies to increase availability of housing for low- and moderate-income families within reasonable proximity of places of employment for working members of such families to and prevent geographical divergence of such housing and places of employment.Pub. L. 101–625, title IX, § 919104 Stat. 4401Nov. 28, 1990Nov. 28, 1990

Study on Involuntary Housing Displacement; Report to Congress, , , directed Secretary of Housing and Urban Development to continue study on involuntary displacement conducted under , , , set out below, and transmit, not later than , a report to Congress containing data collected since initial report submitted under such section 902, and further recommendations on minimizing involuntary displacement and alleviating problems caused by such displacement.Pub. L. 96–399, title I, § 105(b)94 Stat. 1618Pub. L. 95–557, title IX, § 90292 Stat. 2125Oct. 8, 1980Oct. 31, 1978Mar. 30, 1981

Adequacy, Effectiveness, and Equity of Formula for Allocation of Funds; Report to Congress, , , directed Secretary of Housing and Urban Development, not later than , to report to Congress with respect to adequacy, effectiveness, and equity of formula used for allocation of funds under title I of the Housing and Community Development Act of 1974 (this chapter), with specific analysis and recommendations concerning manner in which such formula is or could be affected by data derived from 1980 decennial census.Pub. L. 96–399, title I, § 11394 Stat. 1622Oct. 8, 1980Jan. 1, 1983

Statement of Policy and Study on Housing Displacement, , , declared it to be the policy of Congress that in administration of Federal housing and development programs, involuntary displacement of persons from homes and neighborhoods should be minimized and in keeping with such stated policy, authorized Secretary of Housing and Urban Development to conduct a study on nature and extent of such displacement and, not later than , report to Congress on recommendations for formulation of a national policy to minimize such displacement.Pub. L. 95–557, title IX, § 90292 Stat. 2125Oct. 31, 1978Jan. 31, 1979

Study on Small Cities; Report to President and Congress; Alternative Formulae, , , directed Secretary of Housing and Urban Development to conduct a study and, not later than one year after , report to President and Congress recommendations on formation of a national policy on developmental needs of small cities and, among other things, include in such report alternative verifiable formulae to be used in distribution of discretionary balance funds available for allocation to such small cities under this chapter.Pub. L. 95–128, title I, § 11391 Stat. 1111Oct. 12, 1977Oct. 12, 1977

children.text: a description of the progress made in accomplishing the objectives of this chapter;
a summary of the use of such funds during the preceding fiscal year;

with respect to the action grants authorized under , a listing of each unit of general local government receiving funds and the amount of such grants, as well as a brief summary of the projects funded for each such unit, the extent of financial participation by other public or private entities, and the impact on employment and economic activity of such projects during the previous fiscal year; andsection 5318 of this title
a description of the activities carried out under .section 5308 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to require recipients of assistance under this chapter to submit to him such reports and other information as may be necessary in order for the Secretary to make the report required by subsection (a).
